title: Marketing & Marcom Executive
description:
A Day in the Life:

  • Develop and implement marketing and communication strategies to raise awareness of KR+D’s design philosophy, projects, and achievements.
  • Create compelling content for various platforms, including website, social media, presentations, and internal communications.
  • Manage digital channels, including content planning and publishing for the website, LinkedIn, Instagram, and other relevant platforms.
  • Plan and execute marketing campaigns across both digital and traditional platforms.
  • Collaborate with designers and internal teams to extract narratives, insights, and content that highlight the value and impact of our design work.
  • Coordinate media relations, including writing and distributing press releases, pitching stories, and handling media enquiries.
  • Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints by maintaining guidelines and quality control over visual and written communications.
  • Support the planning and design showcases – from concept to promotion and post-event coverage.
  • Track and analyse marketing performance through data, reports, and insights, to continuously improve outreach strategies.

What We Are Looking For:

  • Degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
  • Strong skills in content creation, branding, and stakeholder engagement.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and adapt in a fast-paced environment.
  • Experience in design or creative industries is a plus.

If you're passionate about design and storytelling, and you enjoy translating creative work into compelling communications, we’d love to hear from you.

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1976, Kingsmen Design is the powerhouse behind the innovative design solutions for many globally recognized brands.

Our approach goes beyond aesthetics. We believe in design that fosters collaboration, communicates strategies, and inspires our people to achieve greatness. This philosophy is evident in our company culture, where creative thinking is embedded in everything we do.

With over 45 years of experience, Kingsmen Design has a proven track record of delivering exceptional design solutions that make a difference. We partner with clients to understand their unique needs and translate them into spaces that are not only functional and beautiful, but also create meaningful connections with users.
postedCompany.name: KR+D PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
